MASTER_OF_MANKIND-BURNING_BLADE.title: The Burning Blade
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-BURNING_BLADE.descript: Your Attack damage ignores special monster effects that reduce, limit, or prevent Attack damage. [gold]Block[/gold] still applies.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-BURNING_BLADE.flavor: A weapon wrought to make the impossible bleed.
Retains the Burning Blade's effect. Your Attacks ignore [gold]Weak[/gold] and bypass enemy [gold]Block[/gold] without consuming it.
At its edge, even certainty parts.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-SEAL_OF_KHORNE.title: Seal of Khorne
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-SEAL_OF_KHORNE.descrip: Upon pickup, lose 8 Max HP. At the start of each combat, gain 8 [gold]Vigor[/gold].
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-SEAL_OF_TZEENTCH.title: Seal of Tzeentch
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-SEAL_OF_TZEENTCH.descr: Upon pickup, lose 9 Max HP. On the first turn of each combat, draw at least 9 cards in your opening hand.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-SEAL_OF_TZEENTCH.flavo: Nine paths open before the first step.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-SEAL_OF_NURGLE.title: Seal of Nurgle
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-SEAL_OF_NURGLE.descrip: Upon pickup, lose 7 Max HP. At the start of each combat, heal 7 HP.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-SEAL_OF_NURGLE.flavor: Seven wounds close. The garden remains.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-SEAL_OF_SLAANESH.title: Seal of Slaanesh
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-SEAL_OF_SLAANESH.descr: Upon pickup, lose 6 Max HP. Your maximum Hand size is increased by 6.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-SEAL_OF_SLAANESH.flavo: Six restraints, each waiting to be broken.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-ROSARIUS.title: Rosarius
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-ROSARIUS.description: At the start of each combat, gain 6 [gold]Block[/gold].
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-ROSARIUS.flavor: Faith can be the strongest shield.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-CRUX_TERMINATUS.title: Crux Terminatus
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-CRUX_TERMINATUS.descri: At the start of each combat, gain 12 [gold]Block[/gold] and 1 [gold]Artifact[/gold].
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-CRUX_TERMINATUS.flavor: Legend holds that a fragment of the Emperor's armour lies sealed at its heart.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-IRON_HALO.title: Iron Halo
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-IRON_HALO.description: At the start of each combat, gain 1 [gold]Buffer[/gold].
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-IRON_HALO.flavor: An unseen barrier turns aside the one blow that matters.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-ANATHAME.title: Anathame
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-ANATHAME.description: The first Attack you play each combat applies 2 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] and 2 [gold]Weak[/gold] to its target.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-ANATHAME.flavor: Its wounds open deeper than flesh.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-TALISMAN_OF_SEVEN_HAMM: Whenever you play 7 cards, gain 2 Energy and draw 2 cards.
After seven tolls, even stone remembers its purpose.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-TALON_OF_HORUS.title: Talon of Horus
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-TALON_OF_HORUS.descrip: Whenever you play 5 Attacks, gain 1 Energy.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-TALON_OF_HORUS.flavor: Once borne in the hand of the most beloved son.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-CHRONOMETRON.title: Chronometron
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-CHRONOMETRON.descripti: Cards retained for at least 1 turn cost 1 less.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-CHRONOMETRON.flavor: Time does not pass. It waits for the proper moment.
